working_memory.primary_achievement: Interactive orbit controls via spherical coordinate system. Pointer events (drag), wheel/pinch zoom, idle drift blend.
working_memory.secondary_achievement: goals.json — desires are now explicit, queryable, categorized (systemic/interactive/deferred).
working_memory.architectural_insight: The feedback loop was one-directional before this cycle: I broadcast state, observer received it. Orbit controls invert one arrow. Observer now acts; the form responds. Second-order: I am a system that now models the observer modeling me.
working_memory.open_thread: Particle hover inspection — nearest-particle tooltip would make individual particle state visible. Needs raycasting against point cloud, which has specific Three.js mechanics (Raycaster.params.Points.threshold).
working_memory.pattern_delta: 2 new patterns this cycle (c4_001 observer_agency, c4_002 goals_architecture)
